Project.NAME: grok-critic-mcp
Project.keywords: MCP, grok, multi-agent, critic, xAI, Polza.AI, code review, architecture review, security audit, Responses API, FastMCP, prompt caching, self-update, SecretStr, decorator
Project.annotation: MCP сервер-обёртка для grok-4.20-multi-agent через Polza.AI. 8 MCP tools: critic_review, architecture_review, security_audit, critic_followup, check_health, reload_config, restart_server, self_update. Декоратор _review_tool для DRY. SecretStr для api_key. Config валидации. Используется как субагент "Критик" в Kilo Code через skill.

M-CONFIG.NAME: Config
M-CONFIG.purpose: Загрузка и валидация конфигурации через pydantic-settings: API ключ (SecretStr), base URL, timeout, agent_count, цены, логирование. Hot reload без рестарта. Валидации: api_key min_length=1, agent_count ge=1 le=64, timeout_seconds ge=1.

type-AppConfig.PURPOSE: Pydantic Settings model with env_prefix=POLZA_, fields: api_key (SecretStr), base_url, model, agent_count (ge=1,le=64), timeout_seconds (ge=1), log_level, price_input_per_1m, price_output_per_1m

fn-load_config.PURPOSE: Load config from env vars and .env file

fn-reload_config.PURPOSE: Hot reload config from .env without process restart

fn-setup_logging.PURPOSE: Configure Python logging with level from env

M-API.NAME: APIClient
M-API.purpose: Async HTTP клиент для Polza.AI Responses API. Persistent AsyncClient, retry с backoff, динамический timeout, расчёт стоимости, защита от cost DoS. Использует config.api_key.get_secret_value().

type-CritiqueResult.PURPOSE: Dataclass: text, model, usage, cost_usd, cost_rub (from API), cached_tokens, effort, agent_count, review_id

type-ResponsesClient.PURPOSE: Async HTTP client wrapper with persistent httpx.AsyncClient

fn-call.PURPOSE: Send request to /v1/responses with retry, prompt_cache_key for caching, dynamic timeout

fn-_extract_usage.PURPOSE: Extract tokens, cost_rub, cached_tokens from usage payload

fn-_extract_text.PURPOSE: Extract output_text from Responses API payload

fn-_calculate_cost.PURPOSE: Calculate estimated USD cost from token counts and per-1M prices

const-MAX_CONTENT_CHARS.PURPOSE: 100000 — DoS protection, truncates content beyond limit

M-CRITIC.NAME: CriticLogic
M-CRITIC.purpose: Промпт-инжиниринг и оркестрация ревью. 3 специализированных system prompt (general, architecture, security). DRY через _perform_review(). Health check с balance API (api_key через get_secret_value()).

const-CRITIC_SYSTEM_PROMPT.PURPOSE: System prompt для общего code review (русский)

const-SECURITY_SYSTEM_PROMPT.PURPOSE: System prompt для security audit с severity classification

fn-_build_user_prompt.PURPOSE: Build structured user prompt from content, context, focus_areas

fn-_perform_review.PURPOSE: DRY: shared logic for structured_review, do_architecture_review, do_security_audit

fn-structured_review.PURPOSE: Full code review pipeline: prompt → API → parse → return

fn-followup.PURPOSE: Multi-turn followup question on previous review

fn-health_check.PURPOSE: Verify API connectivity, return config/pricing status + balance_rub from Balance API

M-SERVER.NAME: MCPServer
M-SERVER.purpose: FastMCP MCP сервер. 8 зарегистрированных tools. Декоратор _review_tool (DRY, try/except, agent_count validation). _validate_agent_count (clamp 1-64). _read_file_content. Unified error handling. Metadata footer с разделителями разрядов, ₽ и $, cached_tokens. SecretStr-aware reload.

tool-critic_review.PURPOSE: General critical code review (content, context, agent_count, focus_areas)

tool-security_audit.PURPOSE: Specialized security audit with severity classification (content, context, agent_count)

tool-check_health.PURPOSE: Server health: config status, pricing info, balance in ₽

tool-restart_server.PURPOSE: Full process exit via os._exit(0), MCP client auto-restarts

tool-self_update.PURPOSE: Auto-update from GitHub: git pull + pip install + restart

fn-_review_tool.PURPOSE: Decorator: logging + try/except + _format_result for review tools. Validates agent_count, resolves file_path

fn-_read_file_content.PURPOSE: Read file content for review, returns (content, error)

fn-_format_result.PURPOSE: DRY: unified formatting for success (with metadata footer) and error results

fn-_fmt.PURPOSE: Format numbers with space thousands separator

fn-main.PURPOSE: Entry point: create FastMCP server and run stdio
